ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for general inquiries */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for general inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "fte" REAL /* Full-time equivalent (FTE) of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the department belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities and goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the job title */,
  "salary_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salary scale associated with the job title */,
  "job_grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the job title */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_scales" (
  "salary_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary scale */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the salary scale belongs to */,
  "salary_scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the salary scale */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the salary scale */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the salary scale */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary scale became effective */,
  "revised_date" TEXT /* Date the salary scale was last revised */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the salary scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fte_values" (
  "fte_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FTE value */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the FTE value belongs to */,
  "fte_value" REAL /* FTE value of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the FTE value */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the FTE value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fte_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fte_values_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_department_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the history entry belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee was assigned to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor during the assignment */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title during the assignment */,
  "fte_value" REAL /* FTE value during the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_department_history_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_department" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Annual budget allocation for the department within the institution */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, department head) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the employee data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the report is associated with */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the report is associated with */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, approved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the report was requested */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_changes" (
  "salary_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the salary change belongs to */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the salary change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the salary change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the salary change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_changes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
